typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl uppercase tracking-tighter font-black
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl uppercase tracking-tight font-black

layout_strategy.scroll: Lenis for smooth continuous scrolling, no CSS scroll-snap.
layout_strategy.sections: 4 primary sections min-h-screen (100vh) each + Branches + Testimonials.
layout_strategy.container: Max-width 1440px with generous p-6 md:p-12 lg:p-20.
layout_strategy.grid: Grid children must be direct children. Avoid nesting grid wrappers unnecessarily.

motion_and_3d.canvas: Fixed full-screen <Canvas> with pointer-events-none placed at a high z-index (e.g. z-40).
motion_and_3d.dumbbell_animation: Use GSAP ScrollTrigger linked to a Three.js group reference. Rotate and position the dumbbell based on scroll progress: Hero (Right), About (Center), Membership (Background), Final CTA (Massive close-up).
motion_and_3d.lighting: Use Three.js <Environment preset="city" /> and directional lights with strong shadows to highlight metallic texture.
motion_and_3d.interactions: Hover states on all buttons (scale up slightly, glow). Hovering feature cards lifts them (-translate-y-2) with a border color shift.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.layout: Left-aligned content block taking up 50% width on desktop. Right side empty to showcase the 3D dumbbell foreground.
sections.visuals: Dark blurred gym interior background with subtle neon ambient light overlay.

sections.name: About + Features

content.heading: We don't just build bodies, we build mentality

sections.layout: 2x2 grid for features using glassmorphism cards. Generous padding inside cards (p-8).
sections.visuals: Dumbbell object scrolls into center or left to intertwine with content.

sections.name: Membership + Trust
sections.layout: 3-column grid for pricing cards. Premium card gets scale-105, #D6FF00 border, and neon glow drop-shadow. Trust metrics displayed below the cards.
sections.visuals: Gym floor texture background (dark metallic look).

sections.name: Branches
sections.layout: 3-column responsive grid (md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with tight gaps.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.layout: Shadcn Carousel showing user images and review texts.

sections.name: Final CTA

content.heading: TRANSFORM YOUR BODY. TRANSFORM YOUR LIFE.

sections.layout: Centered massive typography. Minimal footer at the bottom with social, contact, quick links.

images.description: Dark atmospheric gym with neon lighting
Industrial style gym interior floor texture

3d_assets.description: Realistic metallic dumbbell 3D model (GLTF/GLB). If unavailable, build procedurally in R3F using a Cylinder, two Spheres/Cylinders for weights, and apply a standardMeshMaterial with high metalness (0.9) and low roughness (0.2).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install missing dependencies: yarn add @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei gsap @studio-freight/react-lenis
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout. Use Shadcn only for complex logic components like the Carousel.
Implement fixed <Canvas> spanning the viewport (100vw, 100vh). Link GSAP ScrollTrigger to update 3D camera or dumbbell mesh rotation and position on scroll events.
Ensure dark overlay on background images: bg-black/60 so text remains highly visible.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='join-now-button', data-testid='plan-card').
Apply 'text-[#D6FF00]' specifically to highlight keywords in headings or active UI states.
Maintain strict maximum header size at text-6xl for large viewports. Use tracking-tighter to tighten up Anton font.
